base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_1_e_second_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Second Quest Level 1 'E' — remix dungeon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Second Quest Level 1 'E' — remix dungeon; different room layouts but shape still spells 'E'
